Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.

"opinion": "To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is important to be aware of the potential for misinformation and take steps to verify the accuracy of what you see. This can include fact-checking information before sharing it, using trusted sources for news and information, and being skeptical of content that seems too good (or bad) to be true. Additionally, it is important to be mindful of your own biases and try to seek out multiple perspectives on a given issue. This can include fact-checking information before sharing it, using trusted sources for news and information, and being skeptical of content that seems too good (or bad) to be true. This can include fact-checking information before sharing it, using trusted sources for news and information, and being skeptical of content that seems too good (or bad) to be true.
